ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_code" TEXT /* Code for the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installations" (
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each installation */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the installation belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the installation */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the installation is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the installation is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the installation */,
  "installation_type" TEXT /* Type of the installation */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the installation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the installation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("installation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installations_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the budget component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget estimate */,
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installation the estimate belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget component the estimate belongs to */,
  "fy_2018_cost" REAL /* FY 2018 cost estimate */,
  "fy_2019_cost" REAL /* FY 2019 cost estimate */,
  "fy_2020_cost" REAL /* FY 2020 cost estimate */,
  "fy_2021_cost" REAL /* FY 2021 cost estimate */,
  "fy_2022_cost" REAL /* FY 2022 cost estimate */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_estimates_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES budget_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_estimates_installation_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_id") REFERENCES installations ("installation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds_obligated" (
  "obligation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funds obligation */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget estimate the obligation belongs to */,
  "fy_2019_funds" REAL /* FY 2019 funds available */,
  "fy_2019_obligated" REAL /* FY 2019 funds obligated */,
  "fy_2020_funds" REAL /* FY 2020 funds available */,
  "fy_2020_obligated" REAL /* FY 2020 funds obligated */,
  "fy_2021_funds" REAL /* FY 2021 funds available */,
  "fy_2021_obligated" REAL /* FY 2021 funds obligated */,
  "fy_2022_funds" REAL /* FY 2022 funds available */,
  "fy_2022_obligated" REAL /* FY 2022 funds obligated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obligation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_obligated_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES budget_estimates ("estimate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost change */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget estimate the change belongs to */,
  "cost_estimate" REAL /* Cost estimate */,
  "cost_change" REAL /* Cost change */,
  "percentage_change" REAL /* Percentage change */,
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reason for the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_changes_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES budget_estimates ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_changes_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("reason_id") REFERENCES reasons ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reason */,
  "reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the reason */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reason */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget document */,
  "installation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the installation the document belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the budget document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the document was uploaded */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_documents_installation_id FOREIGN KEY ("installation_id") REFERENCES installations ("installation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., budget analyst, administrator) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES budget_documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review event */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget document being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reviewing the document */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was reviewed */,
  "review_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reviews_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES budget_documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget document being updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user updating the document */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was updated */,
  "update_comments" TEXT /* Comments from the updater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_updates_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES budget_documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
